criteria.description: All visible `Claws Temple` and `Claws Temple AI` brand copy is replaced with `Agent Temple` and `Agent Temple AI` across the page entry, header, hero, share surface, and default content copy.
criteria.notes: Integration and unit coverage verify the new Agent Temple branding in visible content and derived share/profile copy.

criteria.description: Brand-neutralization updates preserve functional external identifiers such as the real GitHub org and deployed domain.
criteria.notes: The implementation updates plain branding text while leaving `Claws-Temple/...` repo references and `https://richardhuang941.github.io/ai-temple-share` intact.

criteria.description: The 009 brand-neutralization set remains buildable and all work packages are recorded in the done lane before acceptance.
criteria.evidence: npm run test && npm run build + kitty-specs/009-agent-temple-brand-neutralization/status.json
criteria.notes: The final validation run passed 29 tests across 4 files, the Vite production build completed successfully, and WP01 through WP02 are materialized in the done lane.
